'''âr-f-y-z''' ('''karafyezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yock|yock]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-f-y-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yock|yock]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-f-y-z
|-
! Lemma
| karafyezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirafyezoko|thirafyezoko]] || [[word:jirafyezoko|jirafyezoko]] || [[word:shirafyezoko|shirafyezoko]] || [[word:kirafyezoko|kirafyezoko]]
|-
